title: Quality Control Analysts
description: Conduct tests to determine quality of raw materials, bulk intermediate and finished products. May conduct stability sample tests.

tasks.text: Conduct routine and non-routine analyses of in-process materials, raw materials, environmental samples, finished goods, or stability samples.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret test results, compare them to established specifications and control limits, and make recommendations on appropriateness of data for release.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calibrate, validate, or maintain laboratory equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Ensure that lab cleanliness and safety standards are maintained.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform visual inspections of finished products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Complete documentation needed to support testing procedures, including data capture forms, equipment logbooks, or inventory forms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile laboratory test data and perform appropriate analyses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and troubleshoot equipment problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write technical reports or documentation, such as deviation reports, testing protocols, and trend analyses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate or report questionable test results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor testing procedures to ensure that all tests are performed according to established item specifications, standard test methods, or protocols.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify quality problems and recommend solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in out-of-specification and failure investigations and recommend corrective actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Receive and inspect raw materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Train other analysts to perform laboratory procedures and assays.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supply quality control data necessary for regulatory submissions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve as a technical liaison between quality control and other departments, vendors, or contractors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write or revise standard quality control operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in internal assessments and audits as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform validations or transfers of analytical methods in accordance with applicable policies or guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate analytical methods and procedures to determine how they might be improved.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare or review required method transfer documentation including technical transfer protocols or reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review data from contract laboratories to ensure accuracy and regulatory compliance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop and qualify new testing methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate testing with contract laboratories and vendors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate new technologies and methods to make recommendations regarding their use.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
